#84 Nested block margins

Expected: each extract block below should have visible spacing above and below it.

First extract paragraph. The paragraph has zero top and bottom margins, but the wrapper div has 4% margins.

Second extract paragraph. There should be visible space before this block.

Third extract paragraph. The parent block spacing should not disappear because the child paragraph margin is zero.

After the extracts, normal text should resume with clear separation from the final extract.
